title: CounterCraft Knife Pack
description: Adds knives from Counter-Strike to the game when renaming tools (axe, sword) at the anvil.
body:
# _CounterCraft Knife Pack_

## Bring the iconic knives from Counter-Strike into Minecraft.

**This resource pack adds custom knife models inspired by CS. The knives replace swords and axes, but only when renamed in an anvil. By default, all items keep their vanilla appearance — the new models appear only if you use the correct name.**

![desc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/126f080690163d89d3ed9da7f30801da05074903.png)

## How it works

**Simply rename a weapon in an anvil to activate a custom model.**

### Example:

- **Rename a Diamond Sword to Ursus → it becomes an Ursus Knife**
- 
- **Other knives are activated the same way using their specific names.**
- 
- **This allows you to keep the vanilla gameplay while adding stylish CS-inspired knives whenever you want.**

## Features

- **CS-inspired knife models**
- 
- **Custom 3D models**
- 
- **Activated via anvil rename**
- 
- **Vanilla friendly**
- 
- **Works in survival**

# 


<details>
<summary>List knifes name.</summary>

### All Swords → 
1. Stilletto
2. Dark Stilletto
3. M9 Bayonet
4. M9 Bayonet Gradient
5. M9 Bayonet Violet
6. Bayonet
7. Bayonet Violet
8. Bayonet Gradient
9. Ursus
10. Ursus Violet
11. Ursus Gradient

### All Axes → 
1. Stilletto
2. Dark Stilletto
3. M9 Bayonet
4. M9 Bayonet Gradient
5. M9 Bayonet Violet
6. Bayonet
7. Bayonet Violet
8. Bayonet Gradient
9. Ursus
10. Ursus Violet
11. Ursus Gradient

</details>



## Requirements

**Version MC 1.21.5+**
